articles.title: Cardano Defies Market Downturn: On-Chain Activity Surges in July, Stats Show
articles.description: The ongoing plunge in the overall crypto market fairly began back in July where the global crypto market cap initially fell to $2.5 trillion from $2.7 trillion earlier in May. However, despite this downturn recorded in July, Cardano (ADA), the 9th largest crypto by market cap appears to have defied this bearish trend.
